summary: The DNS discovery service divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in early returns; no DNS resolution, queued event, or polling behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 127: M	crates/net/dns/src/lib.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return`, `return Poll::Ready(event)`, and `return Poll::Pending` expressions to semicolon-terminated forms.
No cached-entry handling, query scheduling, queued event drain, command processing, or pending-state behavior changed.
